title: One year of the Office of Trade Sanctions Implementation (OTSI)
body: "The review covers:   1 Introduction 2 OTSI’s first year 2.1 Our powers 2.2 Our capability 2.3 Our operational functions 2.4 Our engagement 3 Looking to the future 3.1 More support for business 3.2 Expanding our licensing remit 3.3 More proactive enforcement 4 Find out more  "
